parameters.assert.active: Enable Zend assertions (On/Off). Disabled in production for performance.
parameters.assert.callback: User callback invoked on assertion failure. Empty to disable.
parameters.assert.exception: Throw AssertionError on failed assertion instead of warning (On/Off).
parameters.assert.quiet_eval: Suppress errors from eval() used by assert(). Deprecated/removed.
parameters.assert.warning: Emit a warning on failed assertion (On/Off).
parameters.cgi.check_shebang_line: Respect shebang (#!) line in scripts when running CGI (0/1).
parameters.cgi.discard_path: Ignore script filename in PATH_INFO for security (0/1).
parameters.cgi.force_redirect: Force redirect to prevent unauthorized CGI invocation (0/1).
parameters.cgi.nph: Use non-parsed headers mode for CGI (0/1).
parameters.cgi.redirect_status_env: Environment variable name to pass redirect status; empty disables.
parameters.cgi.rfc2616_headers: Send Status header in RFC 2616 format (0/1).
parameters.doc_root: Document root directory for PHP scripts; empty to accept server default.
parameters.extension_dir: Directory where PHP looks for loadable extensions (.so/.dll).
parameters.include_path: List of directories for require/include, separated by PATH_SEPARATOR.
parameters.sys_temp_dir: System temporary directory used by PHP (uploads, sessions, etc.).
parameters.upload_tmp_dir: Temporary directory for HTTP file uploads; falls back to system temp if empty.
parameters.user_dir: User directory name for ~username style paths (Apache only).
parameters.default_charset: Default output charset for HTML and other content (e.g., UTF-8).
parameters.default_mimetype: Default MIME type for output (e.g., text/html).
parameters.input_encoding: Default input encoding for multibyte support; empty auto-detect or default.
parameters.internal_encoding: Default internal string encoding for mbstring; empty to use default.
parameters.output_encoding: Default output encoding for mbstring; empty to use default.
parameters.zend.detect_unicode: Detect Unicode BOM at script start (On/Off).
parameters.zend.script_encoding: Script encoding name when zend.multibyte is enabled (e.g., SJIS, EUC-JP).
parameters.display_errors: Display runtime errors to output (On/Off). Off in production.
parameters.docref_ext: Append extension to docref links (e.g., .html) in error messages.
parameters.docref_root: Base URL for documentation references in error messages.
parameters.error_append_string: String appended to error messages output.
parameters.error_log: File path or syslog for error logging; leave empty to use SAPI logging.
parameters.error_prepend_string: String prepended to error messages output.
parameters.error_reporting: Error levels to report (bitmask). Common: E_ALL, exclude with ~E_NOTICE, ~E_DEPRECATED.
parameters.ignore_repeated_source: Ignore source line in repeat error detection (On/Off).
parameters.log_errors_max_len: Max length of each logged error line in bytes (0 for unlimited).
parameters.report_memleaks: Report memory leaks detected by Zend MM (On/Off).
parameters.report_zend_debug: Include Zend Engine debug info in error messages (On/Off).
parameters.track_errors: Store last error message in $php_errormsg (On/Off). Removed in PHP 8.
parameters.windows.show_crt_warning: Suppress MSVC CRT warnings on Windows (On/Off).
parameters.xmlrpc_errors: Send XML-RPC errors as XML faults instead of standard errors (On/Off).
parameters.zend.exception_ignore_args: Hide function arguments in exception traces for privacy (On/Off).
parameters.zend.exception_string_param_max_len: Max string length for arguments in exception messages/traces.
parameters.allow_url_fopen: Allow URL-aware fopen wrappers (http, ftp, etc.) (On/Off).
parameters.allow_url_include: Allow include/require via URL wrappers (On/Off). Security risk when On.
parameters.auto_detect_line_endings: Detect Macintosh/Unix/DOS line endings in text files (On/Off).
parameters.auto_globals_jit: Delay initialization of $GLOBALS like $_SERVER until used (On/Off).
parameters.engine: Enable PHP engine (1) or disable to pass-through files (0).
parameters.enable_dl: Allow dl() to load extensions at runtime (On/Off). Disabled on thread-safe/most SAPIs.
parameters.enable_post_data_reading: Automatically read POST data for php://input and $_POST (On/Off).
parameters.expose_php: Add X-Powered-By header with PHP version (On/Off).
parameters.ignore_user_abort: Continue script execution even if client disconnects (On/Off).
parameters.implicit_flush: Flush output after every output call (On/Off).
parameters.last_modified: Set Last-Modified header automatically (timestamp or 0 to disable).
parameters.short_open_tag: Allow short open tag '<?' for PHP code (On/Off). Always allowed for '<?='.
parameters.hard_timeout: SAPI-specific hard timeout for request handling (seconds).
parameters.max_execution_time: Maximum script execution time in seconds (0 for unlimited).
parameters.max_file_uploads: Maximum number of files allowed per upload request.
parameters.max_input_nesting_level: Max nesting level of input variables arrays (e.g., $_GET depth).
parameters.max_input_time: Max time in seconds to parse input data (POST/GET) (−1 unlimited).
parameters.max_input_vars: Max number of input variables accepted (per request).
parameters.max_multipart_body_parts: Max parts allowed in multipart/form-data (−1 unlimited).
parameters.memory_limit: Max memory a script may consume (e.g., 128M, -1 unlimited).
parameters.output_buffering: Enable output buffering (On/Off or size in bytes).
parameters.post_max_size: Max size of POST data allowed (e.g., 8M). Must be ≥ upload_max_filesize.
parameters.precision: Number of significant digits for floating point output.
parameters.realpath_cache_ttl: TTL for realpath cache entries in seconds.
parameters.serialize_precision: Precision for serialize()/json_encode floats (−1 uses full precision policy).
parameters.unserialize_max_depth: Max depth allowed during unserialize() to prevent recursion attacks.
parameters.user_ini.cache_ttl: TTL in seconds for user INI (.user.ini) files.
parameters.mail.force_extra_parameters: Extra command-line params for sendmail (e.g., -f sender).
parameters.mail.log: Log each mail() call to file or syslog.
parameters.mail.mixed_lf_and_crlf: Allow mixed LF and CRLF line endings in mail headers (On/Off).
parameters.sendmail_from: Default From address for Windows mail().
parameters.sendmail_path: Path to sendmail-compatible binary and flags (e.g., /usr/sbin/sendmail -t -i).
parameters.SMTP: SMTP server hostname for Windows mail().
parameters.smtp_port: SMTP server port for Windows mail() (default 25).
parameters.disable_classes: Comma-separated list of classes to disable.
parameters.disable_functions: Comma-separated list of functions to disable (e.g., exec, system).
parameters.open_basedir: Restrict file operations to specified directory tree(s); semicolon separated.
parameters.syslog.facility: Syslog facility to use (e.g., LOG_USER, LOG_MAIL, LOG_LOCAL0..7).
parameters.syslog.filter: Syslog filter mode (e.g., no-ctrl to remove control chars).
parameters.syslog.ident: Syslog ident string (tag) used for log entries.
parameters.zlib.output_compression: Compress output using zlib (On/Off or level).
parameters.zlib.output_compression_level: Compression level for zlib output (−1 default, 0..9).
parameters.zlib.output_handler: Output handler for zlib (e.g., ob_gzhandler). Mutually exclusive with output_handler.
parameters.arg_separator.input: Input argument separator(s) for URL parsing (default '&').
parameters.auto_append_file: Script appended automatically to output at request end.
parameters.auto_prepend_file: Script prepended automatically before main script.
parameters.browscap: Path to browscap.ini for user agent capability detection.
parameters.fiber.stack_size: Default stack size for Fibers in bytes (empty = engine default).
parameters.from: Define the anonymous ftp password (your email address)
parameters.highlight.comment: Syntax highlight color for comments (HTML color).
parameters.highlight.default: Syntax highlight color for default text (HTML color).
parameters.highlight.html: Syntax highlight color for HTML (HTML color).
parameters.highlight.keyword: Syntax highlight color for keywords (HTML color).
parameters.highlight.string: Syntax highlight color for strings (HTML color).
parameters.output_handler: Output buffering handler (e.g., ob_gzhandler). Avoid combining with zlib.output_handler.
parameters.unserialize_callback_func: Callback called when unserialize() encounters undefined class.
parameters.url_rewriter.hosts: Hostname whitelist for transparent SID rewriting across hosts.
parameters.url_rewriter.tags: HTML tags/attributes to rewrite with session ID (e.g., form=, a=href).
parameters.user_agent: Default HTTP User-Agent header for stream wrappers.
parameters.user_ini.filename: Filename for per-directory user INI files (e.g., .user.ini).
parameters.variables_order: Order to register EGPCS variables (Environment, GET, POST, Cookie, Server).
parameters.zend.enable_gc: Enable Zend Garbage Collector for cyclic garbage (On/Off).
parameters.zend.max_allowed_stack_size: Maximum allowed C stack size per request in bytes (−1 unlimited).
parameters.zend.reserved_stack_size: Reserved C stack space to safely handle stack overflows (bytes).
